package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for mock_repository_types_duplicated_across_tests: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Many copy-pasted mock repository structs with the same method sets.
type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsService struct {
    repo *CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

// MockOrderRepository defined in order_test.go — first copy.
type MockOrderRepository struct {
    createFunc func(ctx context.Context, model *CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel) error
    getByIDFunc func(ctx context.Context, id string) (*CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel, error)
    deleteFunc func(ctx context.Context, id string) error
}

func (m *MockOrderRepository) Create(ctx context.Context, model *CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel) error {
    if m.createFunc != nil { return m.createFunc(ctx, model) }
    return nil
}

func (m *MockOrderRepository) GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel, error) {
    if m.getByIDFunc != nil { return m.getByIDFunc(ctx, id) }
    return &CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel{ID: id}, nil
}

func (m *MockOrderRepository) Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
    if m.deleteFunc != nil { return m.deleteFunc(ctx, id) }
    return nil
}

// MockInvoiceRepository defined in invoice_test.go — exact same shape, copy-pasted.
type MockInvoiceRepository struct {
    createFunc func(ctx context.Context, model *CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel) error
    getByIDFunc func(ctx context.Context, id string) (*CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel, error)
    deleteFunc func(ctx context.Context, id string) error
}

func (m *MockInvoiceRepository) Create(ctx context.Context, model *CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel) error {
    if m.createFunc != nil { return m.createFunc(ctx, model) }
    return nil
}

func (m *MockInvoiceRepository) GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel, error) {
    if m.getByIDFunc != nil { return m.getByIDFunc(ctx, id) }
    return &CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel{ID: id}, nil
}

func (m *MockInvoiceRepository) Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
    if m.deleteFunc != nil { return m.deleteFunc(ctx, id) }
    return nil
}

// MockPaymentRepository defined in payment_test.go — exact same shape again.
type MockPaymentRepository struct {
    createFunc func(ctx context.Context, model *CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel) error
    getByIDFunc func(ctx context.Context, id string) (*CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel, error)
    deleteFunc func(ctx context.Context, id string) error
}

func (m *MockPaymentRepository) Create(ctx context.Context, model *CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel) error {
    if m.createFunc != nil { return m.createFunc(ctx, model) }
    return nil
}

func (m *MockPaymentRepository) GetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (*CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel, error) {
    if m.getByIDFunc != nil { return m.getByIDFunc(ctx, id) }
    return &CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel{ID: id}, nil
}

func (m *MockPaymentRepository) Delete(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
    if m.deleteFunc != nil { return m.deleteFunc(ctx, id) }
    return nil
}

func PositiveMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTests(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsDTO) error {
    orderMock := &MockOrderRepository{}
    invoiceMock := &MockInvoiceRepository{}
    paymentMock := &MockPaymentRepository{}
    orderMock.Create(ctx, &CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel{ID: input})
    invoiceMock.Create(ctx, &CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel{ID: input})
    paymentMock.Create(ctx, &CaseMockRepositoryTypesDuplicatedAcrossTestsModel{ID: input})
    return nil
}
